description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in dark gray panels, with large windows on the ground floor and a partially open upper level. A carport with a transparent roof is attached to the front, sheltering a parked vehicle, and the driveway is paved with light gray tiles. The property is landscaped with lush green grass patches and several large, leafy trees and flowering bushes, providing privacy and shade. There is a small outdoor seating area with a wooden bench and table on one side. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with an emphasis on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, large windows, a carport, and lush landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, driveway, main entrance, and two large trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport structure, ground floor windows, and a tall tree partially obscuring the house.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense trees and bushes, with the back of the house barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, a wooden bench and table, and the carport extending from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large ground floor windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, no steps, and direct access from the paved driveway under the carport
